claims.claim: On a three-factor noisy reactor-yield toy simulation over 20 independent seeds at a 20-run budget, the agent achieved a mean best observed yield of 92.84 (SD 0.36), compared to 89.73 (SD 2.30) for safe random sampling and 88.76 (SD 2.47) for LHS-only designs.
